calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20 a.m. and concluding at 9:27 a.m.

Plaintiff Ulman, Seps, & Stein, LTD appearing represented by Lisa Padilla, Esq., testifies via Zoom.
Witness for Plaintiff Seth Bell appeared via zoom.
Defendant KEP MTM 1 LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.
Court examines Plaintiff witness Seth Bell and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ulman, Seps, & Stein, LTD, and against Defendant KEP MTM 1 LLC, as follows:

Damages: $52,329.12
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $7012.50
Costs: $715.85
CAM & Late Fees 12/23-2/24: $8,791.95

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $68,849.42

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
